item.title: Sleek buns always elevate a look!
item.description: Smooth the front, tuck the flyaways, and let the shine do the talking!

media:content.media:title: Sleek buns always elevate a look!
media:content.media:description: Smooth the front, tuck the flyaways, and let the shine do the talking!

item.title: My FAVORITE Cut Crease Method
item.description: I’m showing you exactly how I use eyelid tape to lift hooded eyes and create more lid space. Follow my step-by-step technique to achieve a defined crease and a more open, refreshed look.

media:content.media:title: My FAVORITE Cut Crease Method
media:content.media:description: I’m showing you exactly how I use eyelid tape to lift hooded eyes and create more lid space. Follow my step-by-step technique to achieve a defined crease and a more open, refreshed look.

item.title: How to COVER Dark Circles & Under Eye Bags step-by-step
item.description: In this tutorial I'm teaching you how to create a smooth canvas and cover dark circles, under eye bags and smooth out fine lines with just a few simple steps. I hope you enjoy this tutorial!

media:content.media:title: How to COVER Dark Circles & Under Eye Bags step-by-step
media:content.media:description: In this tutorial I'm teaching you how to create a smooth canvas and cover dark circles, under eye bags and smooth out fine lines with just a few simple steps. I hope you enjoy this tutorial!

item.title: Easy tricks to keep your hands steady for makeup!

media:content.media:title: Easy tricks to keep your hands steady for makeup!

item.title: Stop Wasting Time On Wrong Steps. Try This.
item.description: Ever wondered why your makeup doesn’t last or looks uneven? Watch me reveal the exact steps that change everything – from prep to flawless finish!

media:content.media:title: Stop Wasting Time On Wrong Steps. Try This.
media:content.media:description: Ever wondered why your makeup doesn’t last or looks uneven? Watch me reveal the exact steps that change everything – from prep to flawless finish!

item.title: Nail the perfect sharp wing in seconds

item.title: Eye TAPE for hooded eyes!
item.description: I’m showing you exactly how I use eyelid tape to lift hooded eyes and create more lid space. Follow my step-by-step technique to achieve a defined crease and a more open, refreshed look.

media:content.media:title: Eye TAPE for hooded eyes!
media:content.media:description: I’m showing you exactly how I use eyelid tape to lift hooded eyes and create more lid space. Follow my step-by-step technique to achieve a defined crease and a more open, refreshed look.

item.title: Create more lid space with one simple mapping trick
item.description: If you feel like you’ve run out of room for eyeshadow, this simple mapping trick is for you! I’m showing you how to "cheat" your crease upward to create the illusion of more lid space. This technique is a lifesaver for hooded or deep-set eyes, giving you a bigger, brighter canvas to play with.

media:content.media:title: Create more lid space with one simple mapping trick
media:content.media:description: If you feel like you’ve run out of room for eyeshadow, this simple mapping trick is for you! I’m showing you how to "cheat" your crease upward to create the illusion of more lid space. This technique is a lifesaver for hooded or deep-set eyes, giving you a bigger, brighter canvas to play with.

item.title: 5 Mistakes That May AGE Your Face!
item.description: Is your makeup adding years to your face? We often fall into habits that inadvertently emphasize fine lines or dull the skin. Today, I’m breaking down the 5 most common makeup mistakes that can age you—and showing you the simple, "pro-approved" swaps to keep your look fresh, hydrated, and naturally lifted.

media:content.media:title: 5 Mistakes That May AGE Your Face!
media:content.media:description: Is your makeup adding years to your face? We often fall into habits that inadvertently emphasize fine lines or dull the skin. Today, I’m breaking down the 5 most common makeup mistakes that can age you—and showing you the simple, "pro-approved" swaps to keep your look fresh, hydrated, and naturally lifted.

item.title: My Favorite Cut Crease Method
item.description: Stop struggling with messy lines! I’m revealing my absolute favorite method for achieving a clean, sharp cut crease every single time. Whether you have hooded eyes or just want more lid space, this technique is a total game-changer for a defined, high-glam look.

media:content.media:title: My Favorite Cut Crease Method
media:content.media:description: Stop struggling with messy lines! I’m revealing my absolute favorite method for achieving a clean, sharp cut crease every single time. Whether you have hooded eyes or just want more lid space, this technique is a total game-changer for a defined, high-glam look.

item.title: Glittery Gradient Eyeshadow Look Made Easy!
item.description: Love the sparkle but intimidated by the blend? I’m showing you how to create a stunning glittery gradient eyeshadow look the easy way. Using just your fingers and a few key shades, you can achieve a professional, seamless transition that makes your eyes pop for any special occasion.

media:content.media:title: Glittery Gradient Eyeshadow Look Made Easy!
media:content.media:description: Love the sparkle but intimidated by the blend? I’m showing you how to create a stunning glittery gradient eyeshadow look the easy way. Using just your fingers and a few key shades, you can achieve a professional, seamless transition that makes your eyes pop for any special occasion.

item.title: Tips To Level Up Your Makeup Game!
item.description: Ready to take your skills from basic to breathtaking? I’m breaking down my top tips to level up your makeup game. From mastering skin prep to the "dabbing" blending technique, these small changes will make a massive difference in your final look.

media:content.media:title: Tips To Level Up Your Makeup Game!
media:content.media:description: Ready to take your skills from basic to breathtaking? I’m breaking down my top tips to level up your makeup game. From mastering skin prep to the "dabbing" blending technique, these small changes will make a massive difference in your final look.
